description: Safety-gated MCP bridge for Outlook mail and calendar.

defaultPrompt: Use Outlook Agent to summarize today's inbox and calendar without opening message bodies unless needed.
Use Outlook Agent to draft a reply, then show the review packet before sending.
interface.longDescription: Use Outlook Agent to let Codex inspect Outlook mail and calendar metadata, fetch explicit content, prepare drafts, and execute reviewed writes through dry-run, confirmation, and host approval gates.
interface.shortDescription: Safety-gated Outlook mail and calendar access for Codex.

name: outlook-agent
